title: Star Defender
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Viscount-profile.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Viscount (Viscount-class)|''Viscount'']], the first in a new line of heavy [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Warship/Legends|warships]].]]

'''Star Defenders''' were heavy [[Warship/Legends|warships]] created for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. They took Republic ship-construction in a new direction, towards larger and more intimidating classes than previously built.<ref name="Starship Battles Preview 1">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/SBPreview1|text=''Starship Battles'' Preview 1}}</ref>

==History==
The [[Black Fleet Crisis]] pointed out the weakness of relying only on smaller, compact warships. Following the conflict, design teams at [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] went to work on a concept that would become the largest [[Battleship/Legends|battleship]] ever constructed at the [[Mon Calamari Shipyards/Legends|Mon Calamari Shipyards]], the [[Viscount-class Star Defender|''Viscount''-class Star Defender]].<ref name="Starship Battles Preview 1" />

It was envisioned that ships of this kind would help safeguard the New Republic, defend it against larger threats like the [[Imperial Remnant]]'s [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]].<ref name="Starship Battles Preview 1" /> Because of the more benign purpose of the class, the ship-type was designated "Star Defender", to contrast the use of historically burdened terms like "[[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]."

The first vessel commissioned was the lead ship of the class, [[Viscount (Viscount-class)|''Viscount'']].<ref name="Starship Battles Preview 1" /> During its construction, the face of galactic politics changed, with the formal end of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]] and a gradual return to [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]-style infighting. Finally completed and commissioned in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], ''Viscount'' went on its maiden voyage only weeks before the start of a galactic conflict that would see it put to good use, the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="Vector Prime">''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''</ref>

As the war progressed, other Star Defenders joined the fleet, like the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]]-designed [[Strident-class Star Defender|''Strident''-class]].<ref name="Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''</ref> Following the war, many ''Strident''s were gathered for [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia's]] personal defense and would see action again, during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Betrayal">''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''</ref>

At some point following the Second Galactic Civil War, heavy warships like the Star Defenders and [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnoughts]] were phased out of service, citing the expenses in operating the various designs.<ref name="LECG">''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Known Star Defender classes==
